# HPD.ML.Transforms.ImageResizeTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Resizes images (as byte arrays) to target width and height. Concrete implementation deferred to platform-specific image library.
